mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_no, product_id, product_name, product_cover, product_price, quantity, total_price, created_at
mapper.insert:
insert into ws_order_item(order_id, order_no, product_id, product_name, product_cover, product_price, quantity, total_price) values
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productCover}, #{item.productPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.totalPrice})
mapper.select: select from ws_order_item where order_id = #{orderId} order by id asc
